message:
fix(logger): use explicit enum discriminants and improve stat calculations

Add explicit #[repr(u8)] discriminants to PressureLevel with
Unknown as 0 first to prevent accidental worst-level registration.
Sequence: Unknown(0) > Green(1) > Yellow(2) > Orange(3) > Red(4)
> Critical(5). Fix negative count handling in DeletionStats using
.max(0). Add COALESCE for nullable size_bytes in ORDER BY query.
Include time-to-now accounting for last sample in pressure history
completeness (M7 audit pattern).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
